calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar May-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Michael Maaba's unopposed Motion To Dismiss is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and a proper showing having been made under California Rules of Court, rule 3.770, the court orders this action and all claims herein dismissed without prejudice.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2025 Continued To Jul-08-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
